jobs.job_description:
Working at nference provides exposure to one of the most data-intensive industries in the world. As a Data Analyst Intern, you'll work with structured and semi-structured datasets, develop practical SQL and Python skills, build dashboards, and contribute to projects that transform biomedical information into meaningful insights. This internship is designed for students who enjoy solving analytical problems and want to gain industry experience before graduation.

🏥 About nference

nference is an AI-driven healthcare technology company focused on making biomedical knowledge computable. By partnering with leading hospitals and research institutions, the company converts large volumes of clinical notes, laboratory reports, medical images, and research data into structured information that accelerates scientific discovery.

Rather than performing routine reporting alone, analysts at nference help improve data quality and generate insights that support research, personalized medicine, and healthcare innovation.

🎯 What You'll Be Working On

During this internship, you'll contribute to analytical projects that require extracting, cleaning, validating, and interpreting data from multiple sources.

Your Day-to-day Responsibilities May Include

• Writing SQL queries to retrieve data from relational databases.
• Cleaning and transforming datasets using Python libraries such as pandas and NumPy.
• Performing descriptive and diagnostic analysis to identify trends and anomalies.
• Supporting data validation by identifying inconsistencies and missing values.
• Building reports and dashboards using Excel, Power BI, Tableau, or similar visualization tools.
• Assisting in automating repetitive reporting and data preparation tasks.
• Documenting analytical processes to ensure reproducibility and collaboration.
• Working closely with experienced mentors and cross-functional teams to understand business requirements.

💻 Technical Skills You'll Use

This internship focuses on practical analytical skills rather than theoretical concepts.

SQL Python Pandas NumPy Excel Power BI Tableau Jupyter Notebook

A Strong Understanding Of SQL Is Essential, Including

• Joins
• Aggregations
• Filtering
• Grouping
• Subqueries
• Data validation

Candidates Should Also Be Comfortable Using Python For

• Data cleaning
• Data transformation
• Exploratory analysis
• Working with CSV and Excel datasets
• Basic automation

🎓 Who Can Apply

This Internship Is Intended For Students Pursuing

• Bachelor's Degree
• Master's Degree

Eligible Branches Include

• Computer Science
• Information Technology
• Data Science
• Statistics
• Mathematics
• Engineering
• Other quantitative disciplines

Expected Graduation Year: 2026 or 2027

Candidates with academic projects, internships, or personal projects involving SQL and Python will have an advantage.

📊 Preferred Knowledge

Although not mandatory, the following experience can strengthen your profile:

• Google Colab or Jupyter Notebook
• Kaggle competitions
• Research projects
• Open-source data projects
• Basic statistics
• Predictive analytics
• Large dataset handling
• Distributed data processing concepts

Recruiters often value practical projects that demonstrate problem-solving more than theoretical knowledge alone.

🤝 Learning Environment

Interns will work alongside experienced professionals who provide guidance on analytical thinking, data quality, reporting standards, and scalable analytics workflows.

You'll Also Gain Exposure To

• Modern data pipelines
• Enterprise analytics practices
• Documentation standards
• Cross-functional collaboration
• Data quality assurance processes
• Business-focused problem solving

This makes the internship valuable for students planning careers in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, Data Engineering, or Applied AI.

🚀 What Can Make Your Resume Stronger

Before Attending Interviews, It Is Beneficial To Have

• Two or three SQL projects on GitHub
• A Power BI or Tableau dashboard portfolio
• Python notebooks demonstrating data analysis
• Knowledge of joins, window functions, CTEs, and aggregations
• Familiarity with pandas data manipulation
• Experience cleaning messy datasets
• Strong communication and presentation skills

Candidates who can explain the business impact of their projects usually perform better during technical interviews.

📈 Typical Hiring Process

Application

Resume Review

Technical Assessment

Technical Interview

HR Discussion

Offer

The interview process is expected to evaluate SQL fundamentals, Python programming, analytical reasoning, project experience, and communication skills.

🔑 Keywords for Resume

SQL

• Python
• Pandas
• NumPy
• Data Analysis
• Data Cleaning
• Data Validation
• Data Transformation
• Power BI
• Tableau
• Excel
• Business Intelligence
• Dashboard Development
• Data Visualization
• Exploratory Data Analysis
• Jupyter Notebook
• Google Colab
• Statistics
• Problem Solving
• Analytical Thinking
• Reporting Automation
• Healthcare Analytics

💡 Final Thoughts

The nference Data Analyst Internship is an excellent opportunity for students looking to build practical analytical skills while working on meaningful healthcare datasets. With exposure to SQL, Python, dashboard development, and modern analytics workflows, interns gain valuable industry experience that can strengthen their profile for future Data Analyst, Business Intelligence, and Data Engineering roles.

Data Analyst Intern
Remote (India) | Full-Time Internship | Duration: 13 Months
About Medinex Workforce
Medinex Workforce is a growing organization focused on building skilled talent pipelines across data, technology, and healthcare-adjacent domains. We offer hands-on internship programs designed to give students and early-career professionals real-world project experience.
Role Overview
We are looking for a motivated Data Analyst Intern to join our remote team. You will work on real datasets, assist in generating insights, and support ongoing business reporting and analytics initiatives.
Key Responsibilities

Collect, clean, and organize data from multiple sources

Perform exploratory data analysis to identify trends and patterns

Build basic dashboards and reports using Excel/Google Sheets or BI tools

Support the team in preparing data-driven summaries for stakeholders

Assist in documenting data processes and maintaining data accuracy

Requirements

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, or a related field

Basic knowledge of Excel; familiarity with SQL or Python is a plus

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Good communication skills and ability to work independently in a remote setup

Own laptop and stable internet connection required

Stipend: 16,000/month
Duration: 13 Months
Location: Remote (India)
Job Type: Full-Time Internship
How to Apply
Interested candidates can apply directly through LinkedIn. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further steps. Data Analyst Intern

jobs.job_description:
Selected Intern's Day-to-day Responsibilities Include

• Build AI & Automation Solutions for HR

Identify repetitive, manual, and operational HR processes across the employee lifecycle.

Design and deploy AI-led solutions to reduce administrative effort and improve speed and accuracy.

Develop prototypes, bots, copilots, and workflow automations for HR teams.

Create use cases across recruitment, onboarding, PMS, learning, rewards, employee services, and HR operations.

• Develop HR Digital Products & Platforms

Build and pilot internal HR platforms and intelligent tools.

Support Creation Of

Skill Intelligence Platform

Talent Marketplace / Internal Mobility Engine

Learning Recommendation Engine

Career Architecture & Skills Repository

HR Knowledge Assistant / HR Agent

Workforce Insights Dashboard

• Design AI Agents for Employee & Manager Experience

Develop AI agents to automate employee queries and HR transactions.

Create manager self-service solutions and decision-support tools.

Improve employee experience through conversational interfaces.

• Talent Intelligence & Analytics

Map skills across roles and create skills taxonomy frameworks.

Build data models and dashboards for workforce planning and capability insights.

Generate predictive insights for talent decisions.

• Innovation & Change Enablement

Benchmark emerging AI applications in HR.

Conduct pilots and document business impact.

Prepare leadership updates and transformation roadmaps.

Expected Outcomes

Reduce HR operational effort through automation initiatives.

Launch at least 2–3 working HR AI solutions or MVPs.

Build foundational capability for a Skill Intelligence ecosystem.

Improve employee and manager experience through self-service and intelligent workflows.

About Company: V-Mart is a comprehensive family fashion store that offers its customers genuine value for their money. We offer our customers a great shopping experience each time they visit the V-Mart store by offering a vast range of products under one roof. Maintaining high standards of quality and design, V-Mart offers fashion garments at down-to-earth prices and, over time, has emerged as the destination of choice for bargain hunters.

We primarily operate in tier-2 and tier-3 cities with a chain of retail value departmental stores. Our stores cater to the needs of the entire family by offering apparel and general merchandise. We have 370+ stores across 189 cities in 19 states and union territories. Our stores are located in prime states/UTs such as Bihar, Chandigarh, Gujarat, Haryana, Jammu & Kashmir, Madhya Pradesh, Delhi, Punjab, Rajasthan, Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Jharkhand, Odisha, West Bengal, Arunachal Pradesh, Meghalaya, Nagaland, and Assam.

Healthcare Data Analyst Intern (Remote – India)

Company: Infrabyte Consulting

Location: Remote (India)

Employment Type: Full-time Internship
Duration: 1–3 months

Stipend: ₹15,500 per month

About Us

Infrabyte Consulting is a growing consulting firm focused on delivering healthcare and data-driven solutions across industries. We value precision, analytical thinking, and practical problem-solving.
Role Overview

We are seeking a motivated Healthcare Data Analyst Intern to join our team remotely. This internship offers hands-on experience in healthcare data analysis, reporting, and visualization, providing valuable exposure to consulting projects.
Key Responsibilities

• Assisting in data collection and cleaning from healthcare sources
• Supporting in statistical analysis to identify trends and patterns
• Creating data visualizations using tools like Excel, Power BI, or Tableau
• Preparing reports and dashboards for internal stakeholders
• Collaborating with the team on ad hoc analysis projects

Qualifications

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Healthcare, Data Science, Statistics, or related fields
• Familiarity with Excel, SQL, or Python
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
• Good communication and teamwork abilities

Benefits

• Remote work flexibility
• Practical exposure to healthcare datasets
• Mentorship from experienced professionals
• Certificate of completion at the end of internship

Role Overview:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Data Entry Associate to support our team with basic data management tasks for a short-term requirement of 1–2 months. The role involves handling and updating information in spreadsheets while ensuring accuracy and timely completion of tasks.

Key Responsibilities:

- Enter, update, and maintain data in Excel spreadsheets
- Review data for accuracy and completeness
- Organize and format information as required
- Coordinate with the team for any clarifications related to data entries

Basic Requirements:

- Basic knowledge of Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets
- Valuable communication skills
- Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions
- Availability to work for 1–2 months depending on project requirements

Pay: ₹10,000.00 - ₹15,000.00 per month

Work Location: Remote

jobs.job_description:
🚀 We're Hiring: AI & Data Analytics Intern | ALP Tech

Are you a final-year student or recent graduate excited about applying AI to solve real business problems? We want to hear from you.

📍 Bengaluru (Work from Office)

⏳ 3–6 months of paid internship | Strong performers may convert to a full-time role

What you'll work on:

🔹 Building AI prototypes for Internal Audit and other use cases

🔹 Working with LLMs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) and RAG solutions

🔹 Python & SQL scripting, data cleaning, and Power BI dashboards

🔹 Supporting AI-driven audit outputs — risk registers, test scripts, draft reports

🔹 Client demos and proof-of-concept work in Banking & Financial Services

What we're looking for:

✅ Background in CS, IT, AI, Data Science, or related field

✅ Strong knowledge of Python, SQL, and GenAI/ML concepts

✅ Familiarity with Power BI or similar tools

✅ Strong analytical and communication skills

✅ 0–1 year experience — freshers with solid project work welcome!

Bonus points for:

✨ LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector databases, OCR

✨ Git/GitHub, Azure/AWS exposure

✨ Interest in Banking, Audit, Risk, or Compliance

📩 Interested? DM us to apply!

#Hiring #Internship #AI #DataAnalytics #GenAI #Bengaluru #InternalAudit #FinTech

Job Title: Data Analyst Intern (GOA)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Data Analyst Intern to help collect, organize, and analyze data to support business decisions. This internship is ideal for someone eager to learn data analysis and reporting.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collect, clean, and organize data.
• Prepare reports and dashboards.
• Analyze data to identify trends and insights.
• Assist in maintaining databases and spreadsheets.
• Support the team with data-related tasks.

Requirements:
• Basic knowledge of Excel and SQL.
• Familiarity with Power BI, Tableau, or Python is a plus.
• Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
• Attention to detail and willingness to learn.
• Pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.

Internship Type: Full-time Internship
Location: Panjim / Work from Office
Contact : 8799929455

Application Question(s):
• Where do you Stay?
• How many total years of experience do you have?
• What is your current CTC (If any)
• What is your expected stippend
• How soon you can join/

Education:
• Bachelor's (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

About the internship:
Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Managing and allocating leads to the sales team as per company requirements.

2.Creating, updating, and maintaining sales and business performance dashboards.

Tracking and updating the status of each lead on a daily basis.

3.Providing training to the sales team on proper lead entry and management using spreadsheets.

4.Training team members on bulk email marketing and WhatsApp marketing tools.

Maintaining accurate records of all company data, including leads, customers, sales activities, and reports.

5. Monitoring follow-ups and ensuring timely completion of all assigned tasks and leads.

6. Preparing daily, weekly, and monthly performance reports and MIS reports.

7. Coordinating with different departments to ensure data accuracy and smooth workflow.

8. Identifying gaps in the sales process and suggesting improvements through data analysis.

9. Maintaining proper documentation and ensuring data confidentiality.

10. Supporting management with business insights, analytics, and operational reports as required.

Who can apply:

Only those candidates can apply who:
• are available for full time (in-office) internship
• can start the internship between 2nd Jul'26 and 6th Aug'26
• are available for duration of 6 months
• have relevant skills and interests

Stipend:
INR₹ 6,000 - 12,000 /month

Deadline:
2026-08-02 23:59:59

Skills required:
Data Analytics and MS-Excel

Other Requirements:
• 1. Candidates who have completed a certification course or diploma in Data Analytics, Business Analytics, MIS, Data Science, or related fields will be preferred.
• 2. Candidates should have good knowledge of Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, dashboards, data management, and reporting.
• 3. Familiarity with CRM tools, bulk email marketing tools, WhatsApp marketing tools, and data visualization platforms will be an added advantage.
• 4. Candidates with strong analytical, communication, and team coordination skills are encouraged to apply.

About Company: IntelliSQr is a technology procurement platform for business analytics solutions across different industries. We believe that the customer does not have to reinvent the wheel to solve a business problem. We bring business analytics closure to the customer by recommending an appropriate solution to their business and technical requirements.

Job Title: Data Analyst

Location - Delhi

About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and tech-savvy professional to manage data operations, build automation solutions, and improve business processes using Google Workspace tools. The ideal candidate should have strong Google Sheets expertise and a passion for automation and process optimization.

Key Responsibilities

Manage, maintain, and organize data in Google Sheets.
Create advanced formulas, reports, dashboards, and MIS for business operations.
Develop, test, and maintain automation workflows using Google Apps Script.
Integrate Google Workspace applications with third-party tools and platforms.
Perform data validation, cleansing, analysis, and reporting.
Identify repetitive manual processes and implement automation solutions.
Troubleshoot workflow issues, identify bugs, and implement improvements.
Monitor and maintain existing automation systems to ensure smooth operations.
Collaborate with internal teams to understand requirements and improve efficiency.
Generate actionable insights through data analysis and reporting.

Required Skills

Advanced knowledge of Google Sheets.
Strong understanding of formulas, pivot tables, dashboards, and data visualization.
Working knowledge of Google Apps Script.
Experience with workflow automation and process improvement.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent attention to detail and data accuracy.
Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

Qualification

Graduate in Commerce, Computer Applications, Engineering, IT, or related field.
Freshers with strong Google Sheets and Automation skills may also apply.

What We Offer

Exposure to real-world business automation projects.
Opportunity to work with modern digital tools and technologies.
Learning and career growth opportunities.
Collaborative and innovation-driven work environment.

Interested Candidates

Share your resume at: hidden_email

Compensation: 8,000.00 - 10,000.00 per month
